title: Careers - 211info
text: 211info is a trusted source of information. We embrace equity, kindness and empathy, and we deliver on our values through professionalism, a high-quality database and tech-forward innovations. Search Job Openings Workplace Culture and Values We are committed to equitable hiring practices, and we promote inclusion in our workplace. Learn more about our mission and vision . 211info invites candidates who are committed to working with under-represented populations, who speak languages in addition to English, and who reflect our diverse community. Our Equity Team provides leadership in our ongoing workplace improvements. 211info provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, marital status, amnesty, or veteran status. In addition to competitive pay and benefits, our employees enjoy a uniquely supportive and flexible work culture, including: Remote/virtual work opportunities Certification with City of Portland “Sustainability at Work” program Clean and safe physical work spaces BIPOC, LGBTQ+ and Spanish-speakers Affinity Groups Dog-friendly office Equity team leading inclusive team programs and processes Green team leading environmental stewardship in our workplace Safety team focused on supporting employees’ physical wellness This job teaches you a lot about how to work with people. It’s grown my heart and it’s grown my empathy. I wouldn’t have chosen anything else to be doing with my last couple of years. - Anthony, 211info Employee
